pull.title: [Perf] Wire silu_and_mul_per_block_quant into TritonFP8MoE (MiniMax-M2)
pull.body:
## Purpose Call the existing `ops.silu_and_mul_per_block_quant` fused CUDA kernel in `TritonExperts.apply` to replace the separate `silu_and_mul` + `per_token_group_quant_8bit` steps. ## Test Plan Tested on 4×H800 and 4×H200 with MiniMax-M2.7 (FP8 block-scale, 256 experts, top-8, sigmoid routing). ```bash # Serve vllm serve MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.7 -tp 4 --trust-remote-code --no-enable-prefix-caching # Benchmark vllm bench serve --backend openai-chat --model MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.7 \ --endpoint /v1/chat/completions --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 \ --dataset-name random --num-prompts 128 --request-rate inf --max-concurrency 16 \ --random-input-len --random-output-len --save-result # Accuracy python3 /tests/evals/gsm8k/evaluate_gsm8k.py ``` ## Test Result ### Profile #### Before [dp0_pp0_tp0_dcp0_ep0_rank0.1778644010631004103.pt.trace.json.gz](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27697540/dp0_pp0_tp0_dcp0_ep0_rank0.1778644010631004103.pt.trace.json.gz) #### After [dp0_pp0_tp0_dcp0_ep0_rank0.1778650707904528899.pt.trace.json.gz](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27697517/dp0_pp0_tp0_dcp0_ep0_rank0.1778650707904528899.pt.trace.json.gz) ### H800 #### 8192 in / 1024 out
Before ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 128 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 160.50 Total input tokens: 1053440 Total generated tokens: 131072 Request throughput (req/s): 0.80 Output token throughput (tok/s): 816.63 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1024.00 Peak concurrent requests: 23.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 7379.95 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 1801.05 Median TTFT (ms): 1407.44 P99 TTFT (ms): 9633.04 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 17.84 Median TPOT (ms): 17.57 P99 TPOT (ms): 24.28 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 22.93 Median ITL (ms): 16.06 P99 ITL (ms): 232.40 ================================================== ```
After ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 128 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 152.04 Total input tokens: 1053440 Total generated tokens: 131072 Request throughput (req/s): 0.84 Output token throughput (tok/s): 862.09 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1039.00 Peak concurrent requests: 26.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 7790.78 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 1417.27 Median TTFT (ms): 1432.74 P99 TTFT (ms): 4043.75 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 17.18 Median TPOT (ms): 17.21 P99 TPOT (ms): 18.69 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 22.76 Median ITL (ms): 15.93 P99 ITL (ms): 235.74 ================================================== ```
#### 1024 in / 8192 out
Before ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 128 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 795.10 Total input tokens: 135936 Total generated tokens: 1048576 Request throughput (req/s): 0.16 Output token throughput (tok/s): 1318.80 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1204.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 1489.77 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 391.25 Median TTFT (ms): 394.53 P99 TTFT (ms): 536.16 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 12.09 Median TPOT (ms): 12.03 P99 TPOT (ms): 12.51 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 22.53 Median ITL (ms): 23.55 P99 ITL (ms): 27.12 ================================================== ```
After ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 128 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 788.21 Total input tokens: 135936 Total generated tokens: 1048576 Request throughput (req/s): 0.16 Output token throughput (tok/s): 1330.32 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1200.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 1502.78 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 387.20 Median TTFT (ms): 397.53 P99 TTFT (ms): 537.82 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 11.98 Median TPOT (ms): 12.01 P99 TPOT (ms): 12.13 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 22.38 Median ITL (ms): 23.32 P99 ITL (ms): 26.60 ================================================== ```
#### 1024 in / 1024 out
Before ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 128 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 107.31 Total input tokens: 135936 Total generated tokens: 131072 Request throughput (req/s): 1.19 Output token throughput (tok/s): 1221.48 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1200.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 2488.29 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 393.13 Median TTFT (ms): 392.47 P99 TTFT (ms): 530.69 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 12.73 Median TPOT (ms): 12.62 P99 TPOT (ms): 13.35 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 16.92 Median ITL (ms): 13.70 P99 ITL (ms): 27.22 ================================================== ```
After ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 128 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 105.82 Total input tokens: 135936 Total generated tokens: 131072 Request throughput (req/s): 1.21 Output token throughput (tok/s): 1238.68 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1230.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 2523.34 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 364.52 Median TTFT (ms): 323.12 P99 TTFT (ms): 533.98 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 12.57 Median TPOT (ms): 12.51 P99 TPOT (ms): 13.23 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 16.79 Median ITL (ms): 13.55 P99 ITL (ms): 27.14 ================================================== ```
### H200 #### 8192 in / 1024 out
Before ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 128 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 130.62 Total input tokens: 1053440 Total generated tokens: 131072 Request throughput (req/s): 0.98 Output token throughput (tok/s): 1003.49 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1214.00 Peak concurrent requests: 31.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 9068.63 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 1400.88 Median TTFT (ms): 1229.64 P99 TTFT (ms): 3513.20 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 14.57 Median TPOT (ms): 14.74 P99 TPOT (ms): 15.69 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 19.08 Median ITL (ms): 13.58 P99 ITL (ms): 191.81 ================================================== ```
After ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 128 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 129.30 Total input tokens: 1053440 Total generated tokens: 131072 Request throughput (req/s): 0.99 Output token throughput (tok/s): 1013.74 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1216.00 Peak concurrent requests: 31.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 9161.30 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 1519.61 Median TTFT (ms): 1281.40 P99 TTFT (ms): 3619.17 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 14.29 Median TPOT (ms): 14.46 P99 TPOT (ms): 15.54 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 19.26 Median ITL (ms): 13.50 P99 ITL (ms): 195.41 ================================================== ```
#### 1024 in / 8192 out
Before ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 128 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 705.56 Total input tokens: 135936 Total generated tokens: 1048576 Request throughput (req/s): 0.18 Output token throughput (tok/s): 1486.16 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1387.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 1678.83 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 319.99 Median TTFT (ms): 349.92 P99 TTFT (ms): 532.61 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 10.73 Median TPOT (ms): 10.71 P99 TPOT (ms): 10.84 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 20.18 Median ITL (ms): 21.01 P99 ITL (ms): 23.67 ================================================== ```
After ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 128 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 700.02 Total input tokens: 135936 Total generated tokens: 1048576 Request throughput (req/s): 0.18 Output token throughput (tok/s): 1497.91 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1402.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 1692.10 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 344.06 Median TTFT (ms): 365.50 P99 TTFT (ms): 594.07 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 10.64 Median TPOT (ms): 10.62 P99 TPOT (ms): 10.83 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 19.79 Median ITL (ms): 20.77 P99 ITL (ms): 23.96 ================================================== ```
#### 1024 in / 1024 out
Before ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 128 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 94.90 Total input tokens: 135936 Total generated tokens: 131072 Request throughput (req/s): 1.35 Output token throughput (tok/s): 1381.09 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1381.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 2813.43 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 326.67 Median TTFT (ms): 358.97 P99 TTFT (ms): 581.53 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 11.26 Median TPOT (ms): 11.23 P99 TPOT (ms): 11.72 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 14.98 Median ITL (ms): 11.95 P99 ITL (ms): 23.95 ================================================== ```
After ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 128 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 93.83 Total input tokens: 135936 Total generated tokens: 131072 Request throughput (req/s): 1.36 Output token throughput (tok/s): 1396.92 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1399.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 2845.67 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 366.28 Median TTFT (ms): 381.45 P99 TTFT (ms): 603.40 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 11.08 Median TPOT (ms): 11.05 P99 TPOT (ms): 11.51 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 14.91 Median ITL (ms): 11.87 P99 ITL (ms): 23.87 ================================================== ```
#### Accuracy
Before ``` Results: Accuracy: 0.924 Invalid responses: 0.000 Total latency: 58.411 s Questions per second: 22.581 Total output tokens: 132032 Output tokens per second: 2260.399 ```
After ``` Results: Accuracy: 0.926 Invalid responses: 0.000 Total latency: 56.377 s Questions per second: 23.396 Total output tokens: 132205 Output tokens per second: 2345.017 ```
### Summary | Platform | Scenario | Total tok/s Before | Total tok/s After | Delta | |----------|----------|--------------------|--------------------|-------| | H800 | 8192→1024 | 7379.95 | 7790.78 | **+5.6%** | | H800 | 1024→8192 | 1489.77 | 1502.78 | **+0.9%** | | H800 | 1024→1024 | 2488.29 | 2523.34 | **+1.4%** | | H200 | 8192→1024 | 9068.63 | 9161.30 | **+1.0%** | | H200 | 1024→8192 | 1678.83 | 1692.10 | **+0.8%** | | H200 | 1024→1024 | 2813.43 | 2845.67 | **+1.1%** | | Metric | Before | After | |--------|--------|-------| | gsm8k | 0.924 | 0.926 | ---
Essential Elements of an Effective PR Description Checklist - [x] The purpose of the PR, such as "Fix some issue (link existing issues this PR will resolve)". - [x] The test plan, such as providing test command. - [x] The test results, such as pasting the results comparison before and after, or e2e results - [ ] (Optional) The necessary documentation update, such as updating `supported_models.md` and `examples` for a new model.

repo.name: vllm
repo.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

files.patch:
@@ -31,6 +31,9 @@
     _resize_cache,
     moe_kernel_quantize_input,
 )
+from vllm.model_executor.layers.quantization.utils.fp8_utils import (
+    is_deep_gemm_e8m0_used,
+)
 from vllm.model_executor.layers.quantization.utils.quant_utils import (
     QuantKey,
     kFp8Dynamic128Sym,
@@ -283,20 +286,36 @@ def apply(
                 top_k_num=top_k_num,
             )
 
-        self.activation(
-            activation, intermediate_cache2, intermediate_cache1.view(-1, N)
-        )
-
         a2q_scale: torch.Tensor | None = None
 
-        qintermediate_cache2, a2q_scale = moe_kernel_quantize_input(
-            intermediate_cache2,
-            a2_scale,
-            self.quant_dtype,
-            self.per_act_token_quant,
-            self.block_shape,
-            quantization_emulation=self.quantization_emulation,
-        )
+        # Fuse SiLU+Mul + FP8 block quantize into a single kernel
+        # when conditions permit (gated SiLU, fp8 block quant with
+        # group_size=128, no LoRA requiring the BF16 intermediate).
+        if (
+            activation == MoEActivation.SILU
+            and self.quant_config.use_fp8_w8a8
+            and self.block_shape == [128, 128]
+            and lora_context is None
+            and not is_deep_gemm_e8m0_used()
+        ):
+            qintermediate_cache2, a2q_scale = ops.silu_and_mul_per_block_quant(
+                intermediate_cache1.view(-1, N),
+                group_size=128,
+                quant_dtype=current_platform.fp8_dtype(),
+            )
+        else:
+            self.activation(
+                activation, intermediate_cache2, intermediate_cache1.view(-1, N)
+            )
+
+            qintermediate_cache2, a2q_scale = moe_kernel_quantize_input(
+                intermediate_cache2,
+                a2_scale,
+                self.quant_dtype,
+                self.per_act_token_quant,
+                self.block_shape,
+                quantization_emulation=self.quantization_emulation,
+            )
 
         invoke_fused_moe_triton_kernel(
             qintermediate_cache2,
